books.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
books.summary: A young boy discovers he is a wizard and begins his magical education at Hogwarts. As he learns about spells, magical creatures and friendship, he also uncovers secrets about his own past. Together with his friends Ron and Hermione, Harry faces challenges that test his courage and loyalty. The story mixes adventure, mystery and fantasy in a world full of wonder. It is the beginning of Harry's journey against dark forces.

books.title: The Hobbit
books.summary: Bilbo Baggins joins a dangerous adventure to help dwarves reclaim their lost home. At first, Bilbo is afraid and unsure whether he belongs in such a risky journey. Along the way, he meets trolls, elves, goblins and a mysterious creature named Gollum. He slowly discovers bravery and cleverness within himself. The story is a classic fantasy adventure about growth, courage and unexpected heroism.

A man lives under a strict totalitarian regime where freedom and truth are controlled. Winston Smith begins to question the government that watches every part of people's lives. As he searches for truth and personal freedom, he risks everything in a society built on fear. The novel shows how language, history and thought can be manipulated by power. It is a dark warning about surveillance, propaganda and the loss of individuality.

books.title: The Little Prince
books.summary: A young prince travels between planets and learns deep lessons about life and love. During his journey, he meets strange adults who represent different human weaknesses. His conversations reveal important ideas about friendship, imagination and responsibility. The story looks simple, but it carries deep meaning for both children and adults. It reminds readers that the most important things are often invisible to the eye.

books.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
books.summary: A young girl observes racism and injustice in her small town through her father's trial. Scout Finch grows up while learning difficult truths about people and society. Her father, Atticus Finch, tries to defend an innocent man despite strong prejudice around him. The novel explores morality, empathy and courage through the eyes of a child. It is a powerful story about justice, kindness and standing up for what is right.

books.title: Pride and Prejudice
books.summary: Elizabeth Bennet navigates love, pride, family pressure and social expectations. She meets Mr. Darcy, a wealthy man who first appears arrogant and distant. As misunderstandings grow, both characters must confront their own mistakes and assumptions. The novel combines romance, humor and social criticism in a sharp and elegant way. It shows how true understanding often requires humility and personal growth.

books.title: The Great Gatsby
books.summary: A mysterious millionaire pursues lost love in the glamorous but empty world of the 1920s. Jay Gatsby throws luxurious parties while secretly hoping to reunite with Daisy Buchanan. Behind the beauty and wealth, the story reveals loneliness, obsession and broken dreams. The novel criticizes the illusion of success and the dark side of the American Dream. It is a poetic and tragic story about love, memory and desire.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.summary: A shepherd follows his dream and learns about destiny, courage and personal growth. Santiago leaves his familiar life behind to search for a hidden treasure. During his journey, he meets people who teach him to listen to his heart and trust the path ahead. The story uses simple language to explore big ideas about purpose and self-discovery. It encourages readers to follow their dreams and recognize the signs around them.

books.title: The Da Vinci Code
books.summary: A professor follows hidden clues to solve a mystery involving art, religion and secret societies. Robert Langdon is pulled into a dangerous investigation after a murder at the Louvre Museum. As he follows symbols and codes, he uncovers secrets connected to history and faith. The novel moves quickly with puzzles, suspense and unexpected twists. It is a thriller that combines mystery, art history and conspiracy.
